name: Johannes Kepler
title: Astronomer & Mathematician
bio: German astronomer, mathematician, and astrologer who discovered the three laws of planetary motion, foundational to Isaac Newton's theory of universal gravitation.
faith: A devout Lutheran who saw his scientific work as a form of worship. He wrote, 'I was merely thinking God's thoughts after Him. Since we astronomers are priests of the highest God in regard to the book of nature, it benefits us to be thoughtful.'

sources.title: Johannes Kepler — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his Lutheran faith and view of science as worship

sources.title: Harmonices Mundi (The Harmony of the World) — Johannes Kepler
sources.note: Kepler's masterwork describing planetary motion as God's geometric harmony — he wrote: 'I was merely thinking God's thoughts after Him'

sources.title: Johannes Kepler: His Life, His Laws and Times — NASA
sources.note: NASA profile noting Kepler's deep Lutheran faith and his conviction that studying astronomy was a form of worship

tagline: Thinking God's thoughts after Him through planetary motion
